items.title: At least 1 dead in Texas floods ravaging same area where campers died
items.dek: The same area devastated by floods last year - causing more than 130 deaths - is once again being targeted by life-threatening floods.
items.body: The same area devastated by floods last year - causing more than 130 deaths - is once again being targeted by life-threatening floods.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Hegseth says flyovers to continue until 'morale improves' despite safety worries

items.title: What to know about the Canadian and US wildfires and their impact
items.dek: Wildfires in Ontario have blanketed US and Canadian cities with dangerous smoke.
items.body: Wildfires in Ontario have blanketed US and Canadian cities with dangerous smoke.
items.author: IriLine Desk
